framework.name: Governance Framework Implementation Timeline
framework.description: NIST AI RMF requires 3-6 months implementation, ISO 42001 certification takes 6-12 months, SOC 2 Type II requires 8-11 months including 6-month operational period. This quantifies governance deployment friction but not monitoring infrastructure gaps.
framework.raw_quote: NIST AI RMF: 3-6 months implementation, ISO 42001: 6-12 months certification, SOC 2 Type II: 8-11 months (includes 6-mo operational)

source.title: Enterprise AI Adoption Strategy: Complete 2025 Guide
